title: Extra Tools and Armors
description: A mod that add 8 diffrent set of armors and tools using Vanilla Items & Materials with some upgrade on it!
body:
**> Extra Tools & Armors v1.0.0**!

# About This Mod
- This mod added 8 new diffrent armors and tools that can be craft by using Vanilla items. Some armor may need you to grind and craft through a lot of recipes and diffrent way. Better with help of your friends!
![All Items This Mod Have](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/581d09358e30e87edd5075a748bdde4c2cc74ebb.png)
- Custom Crafting Recipes for New Items, include New Armors!

![Obsidian Armor!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9611e3e8f9eee50d10d5426372829c5c7f6f783.png)
![Stick Use For Crafting Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d187bc599198988c7fbc56931f31302f573ad5e6.png)
![Custom Smithing Template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/263fa11459ce1ea4be01cb0fbb3acf7bb82daa0e.png)
![and Custom Material](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb1213ed247a4863f0e0644409caa18d2c27b456.png)
  
## Items and Features
- Diamond Stick
- Netherite Stick
- Ultra Netherite Ingot
- Ultra Netherite Stick 
- Ultra Netherite Upgrade Template (for crafting the last armor)
- Ultimate Netherite Ingot
- Ultimate Netherite Stick
- Ultimate Netherite Upgrade Template
- Obsidian Items (Nugget, Crystals, Shard, Smelting Bottle, Ingot...)

(Require Full Armors. Unequip 1 piece of armor can remove the effect!)
- Coal Armor: Night Vision VI
- Copper Armor: Speed IV
- Redstone Armor: Haste II and Glowing X
- Lapis Armor: Give You Free 1 Level of Experience Bar every 10000s (to prevent afk give xp)
- Emerald Armor: Haste IV, Luck V and Hero Of The Village V

(Difficult Crafting Armor)
- Ultra Netherite Armor: Full Armors Effect Bonus: Haste III, Absorption III, Resistance III
- Ultimate Netherite Armor: Full Armors Effect Bonus: Haste V, Absorption V, Resistance V

and The Final Armor: Obsidian Armors: Full Armors Effect Bonus: Fire Resistance X, Regeneration X, Strength X, Resistance X.

### 
You can use the mod in any modpack if you want, as long as you credit like all the other mod. 
Install JEI mod to see all the items recipes. 

Thanks!

#### Update In The Future (Maybe)
- More Armors and Tools Using Vanilla Material only!
- New Food? i guess
- New Block
